THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERKINS, CHESTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 770 O'FARRELL STREET, ROOM #43, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $289.33 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $289.33, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
